name: vid_composite
description: Composite a video with a per-frame object mask: cut the object out, highlight it, or swap its background. args: {video, masksDir?: string, rleJson?: string, mode: 'cutout'|'highlight'|'background', color?: [r,g,b]} (video sandbox-relative; exactly one of masksDir [a directory of frame-%04d.png mask PNGs, white=object] or rleJson [a JSON file: either one COCO-RLE dict applied to every frame, or a list of one COCO-RLE dict per frame, same shape as vid_track's masks.rle.json]; mode='cutout' fills everything outside the mask with black, 'highlight' blends color over the masked object leaving the rest of the frame untouched, 'background' fills everything outside the mask with color [default green]). Returns {outputPath, warning?}.
